---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with Shipwise
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce
1. Run `/shipwise` or describe the action
2. What happened
3. What you expected

## Environment
- Claude Code version:
- OS:
- Tech stack of your project:
- Shipwise experience level setting: beginner / intermediate / senior

## Hook involved (if applicable)
- [ ] session-context (SessionStart)
- [ ] post-edit-check (PostToolUse)
- [ ] pre-deploy-gate (PreToolUse)
- [ ] stop-updater (Stop)
- [ ] Not hook-related
